t: How to Say "I'm Excited" in Malayalam
d: Enikku valiya santhoshamaanu — I'm really happy/excited

t: How to Say "I'm Bored" in Malayalam
d: Enikku bore adikkunnu — I'm bored

t: How to Say "I'm Confused" in Malayalam
d: Enikku manassilaavunnilla — I don't understand / I'm confused

t: Hobbies & Sports Words in Malayalam
d: Hobikalum kaayikavum — Hobbies & sports

t: How to Talk About Hobbies in Malayalam
d: Ninte hobby entha? — What's your hobby?

t: How to Say "I Love Kerala" in Malayalam
d: Enikku keralam valare ishtamaa — I really love Kerala

t: Spices & Cooking Ingredients in Malayalam
d: Masaalayum cheruvakalum — Spices & ingredients

t: How to Ask "What's in This Dish?" in Malayalam
d: Ithil entha ullathu? — What's in this?

t: How to Say "See You Soon" in Malayalam
d: Pettennu kaanaam — See you soon

t: How to Ask "Can I Pay by Card?" in Malayalam
d: Card vechu pay cheyyaamo? — Can I pay by card?

t: How to Ask "Do You Have WiFi?" in Malayalam
d: Ivide WiFi undo? — Do you have WiFi here?

t: How to Say "I'm Proud of You" in Malayalam
d: Enikku ninne orthu abhimaanamundu — I'm proud of you
